questions.name: C – Pointers: 2D array and pointer arithmetic
questions.questiontext: Analyze the code below. Write a single line of code that assigns to the variable result the square of the array element located in the second row and third column, using only the provided functions and pointer arithmetic. Your answer must not contain extra spaces.

questions.name: C - Streams: reading two integers from a file
questions.questiontext: Analyze the code below. Write a single line of code that reads two integers from an already opened file stream into variables x and y. Your answer must not contain extra spaces.
